title: Craft++
description: CraftPlusPlus is a Minecraft mod which aims to enhance many things about the game. Adding loads of new things to make Minecraft feel great again!
body:
# The Mod Craft Plus Plus is a Minecraft mod which aims to enhance many things about the game. Adding loads of new things to make Minecraft feel great again! # Community We have a [Discord](https://discord.gg/pp3TacNa22) Where you can chat with the developers and contributors and report any bugs or suggestions that you have, and to be part of the community! # Dependencies Optional Dependencies: - [JEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) # Development [**TheJeeZed**](https://github.com/TheJeeZed) Owner
[**luhcartimods**](https://github.com/luhcartimods) Lead Dev/Textures
[**AvacadoWizard120**](https://github.com/AvacadoWizard120) Lead Dev
[**wolfieboy09**](https://github.com/wolfieboy09) Dev
# Contributors **GF 👀** - Textures/Models
**-Ghoul-** - Textures/Models
**カテル** - Textures/Models
**MaxF1v3** - Textures/Models
